original_title: Germany – Dental and subspecialty instruments and devices

eligibility_requirements: Manufacturers and suppliers of inventory management/materials management systems for the dental sector with rotating instruments. Must provide references for use of the solution in the dental field with rotating instruments, and experience or references with consignment models in the dental sector.
evaluation_criteria: NOT FOUND (this is a market research exercise, not a formal tender evaluation)

buyer_name: COPERNICUS PODMIOT LECZNICZY SPÓŁKA Z OGRANICZONĄ ODPOWIEDZIALNOŚCIĄ
english_summary: This tender is for design and construction work to adapt rooms in building K at St. Wojciech Hospital in Gdańsk to improve cardiology care accessibility and quality. The project includes design, construction and installation works, delivery of an angiograph system, and preparation of rooms for magnetic resonance equipment installation under a design-and-build contract.
what_they_want: One angiograph system (must be brand new, complete, high standard quality and functionality, free from material and construction defects, compliant with Medical Devices Act of April 7, 2022). Preparation of rooms for magnetic resonance (MRI) installation. Construction and installation works for renovation and modernization of hospital rooms and infrastructure on level 0 of buildings K and A.
eligibility_requirements: Contractor must employ persons performing construction works under supervision of construction manager or branch work managers (as per Article 22 § 1 of the Labor Code of June 26, 1974). Contractor must obtain insurance covering all risks and liability related to contract execution before site handover. No restriction to specific types of contractors under Article 94 of Public Procurement Law.
evaluation_criteria: Warranty period for construction and installation works (minimum 36 months, maximum 60 months from final acceptance) is one of the evaluation criteria. Price weighting and other specific criteria weights NOT FOUND in provided excerpt.
